reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, como son la única estación en varios kilómetros, se abusan y atienden como quieren y cuando quieren. Un verdadero desastre

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. Since they're the only station for miles around, they take advantage of the situation and serve customers however and whenever they want. A complete disaster.
